title: Create Grappling Hooks
description: A grappling hook for Create: Aeronautics — fire cables across the sky, ride them on a trolley, carry other players, and swing between your airships.
body:
![Mod title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d6e8dec46fb425262935c684dde064341e70f29.png)

[![Support me on Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/braumav)

A grappling hook movement add-on for **Create: Aeronautics**. Fire cables across the sky, **swing between your airships like Spider-Man**, ride cables on a trolley, and carry your friends along.

## ✨ Features

- **Grapple Launcher** — fire a cable between two points (works on terrain *and* moving physics ships/floors).
- **Swing Hook** — a swing-anywhere grappling hook. Fire it at any surface and **swing** from it like Spider-Man. **Dual-wield one in each hand** for the full tensed pose. Reel the rope in/out with **Shift+W / Shift+S**.
- **Momentum-based release** — the faster you swing, the **farther you launch** when you let go. Release with a click, *Space*, or *Ctrl+Space*.
- **Rope that wraps around obstacles** — your rope bends and curves around blocks and airship edges as you swing, instead of clipping through them.
- **Cable Trolley** — clip onto a cable and ride it, moving toward wherever you look.
- **Hand-hold chain** — right-click a riding player to grab their free hand and get carried along. The whole chain moves in perfect sync.
- **Three ways to dismount** — *Shift* to drop, *Space* to hop ~1 block toward your view, *Ctrl + Space* to launch ~3 blocks. Works for the rider **and** the carried player.
- **Spinning rollers** — the trolley's wheels roll as you slide along the cable.
- **One trolley per rider** — a connector can only be ridden by one player at a time.
- **Custom model, texture & sound effects** — fully redesigned guns, dart and connector.
- **Shaderpack compatible** (Iris / Oculus).
- **Multiplayer ready** — fully synced; others see you swing, hang, ride, get carried, and **watch your rope wrap around obstacles in real time**.

## ⚠️ Required versions — please read before installing!

This addon hooks directly into Create: Aeronautics' items and its **native physics**, so the versions must match. Using different ones **can crash the game**.

- **Minecraft 1.21.1** + NeoForge
- **Create** 6.0.x *(tested on 6.0.10)*
- **Create: Aeronautics** 1.2.x — the `create-aeronautics-bundled` file *(tested on 1.2.1)*
- **Sable** 1.2.x — ships with Aeronautics *(tested on 1.2.2)*

This version now **refuses to load with a clear message** if it finds an incompatible Create: Aeronautics or Sable version, instead of crashing.

## Game crashed / won't start after adding the mod?

It's almost always a **version mismatch** of Create: Aeronautics or Sable.

- ✅ **Your world is NOT broken** — the mod only crashes while loading it, and it never touches your saved world.
- To get back in: remove this mod from your `mods` folder, launch, and re-add it once your Create: Aeronautics + Sable versions match the list above.
- It's a native crash, so there's no normal crash report — if it keeps happening, send me the `hs_err_pid####.log` file from your game folder and I'll help.

## 🎮 How to use

1. Craft the **Grapple Launcher**, **Swing Hook** and **Cable Trolley** (recipes shown in JEI/EMI).
2. **Swing Hook:** right-click to fire (left-click for an off-hand second hook). Swing freely; **Shift+W/S** to reel up/down; click or *Space* / *Ctrl+Space* to let go (the faster you swing, the farther you fly).
3. **Grapple Launcher:** right-click two surfaces to span a cable.
4. **Cable Trolley:** hold it and right-click the cable to clip on and ride. Move with **W/S** toward where you look; **Shift / Space / Ctrl+Space** to get off.
5. Remove cables with the **Create Wrench** (*Shift + right-click*).

## ⚠️ Known issues (being worked on)

- The hook can still **occasionally fly off** when the rope wraps around an obstacle.
- The rope **only wraps around one physics platform at a time** — if it crosses several *separate* floating Aeronautics platforms, it wraps around just one.
- On fast-rotating platforms, the rope can be dragged along with the rotation.
